title: Better Vanilla Experience
description: I made this modpack for those who like playing Vanilla+ Minecraft
body:
# **Better Vanilla Experience**
![BVE Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c13c3e4673fd6176df1566741e98386a7f5afca.png)


## **Description**
This modpack is created for those players who love playing Minecraft, but find the vanilla gameplay boring.
If this description applies for you, BVE is just the perfect modpack for you! It contains the most popular Vanilla+ mods out there, with a lot of optimization mods to ensure you have high FPS while playing.
BVE also contains a lot of new animations for those who don't like the vanilla ones.

I will try to update the pack frequently in the future


## **Versions:**
- 1.21.4
- 1.21.8, but it has removed mods, also planning to update it (removed mods list in changelog)
